originalTitle: 'Fire came from the sky and burned them' - life on the brink of civil war in South Sudan
title: 'Fire came from the sky and burned them' - life on the brink of civil war in South Sudan
content: Some 50,000 people are told to flee their homes as the army warns of a huge military offensive in Jonglei state.

originalTitle: Russia agrees to stop using Kenyan recruits in Ukraine conflict, Kenya says
title: Russia agrees to stop using Kenyan recruits in Ukraine conflict, Kenya says
content: Some 1,000 Kenyans are believed to have recruited to fight in Ukraine - many say they were lured under false pretences.

originalTitle: Whistleblower murder suspect is former elite officer, South African police say
title: Whistleblower murder suspect is former elite officer, South African police say
content: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.

originalTitle: Drone sparks fire at UAE oil site as Gulf takes more hits amid Iran war
title: Drone sparks fire at UAE oil site as Gulf takes more hits amid Iran war
content: The Fujairah oil hub has been hit repeatedly by Iranian drones as the US-Israeli war continues to ignite instability.

originalTitle: Inside Qeshm, Iran’s underground missile fortress and geological marvel
title: Inside Qeshm, Iran’s underground missile fortress and geological marvel
content: From the Valley of Stars to underground missiles, Qeshm Island is strategic ground zero for the US-Israel war on Iran.

originalTitle: Twitter trial accusing Musk of driving down stock set for closing arguments
title: Twitter trial accusing Musk of driving down stock set for closing arguments
content: The civil trial centres on a class-action lawsuit filed just before Musk took control of Twitter, which was renamed X.

originalTitle: Trump's confidence is undimmed - but every Iran option comes with risk
title: Trump's confidence is undimmed - but every Iran option comes with risk
content: The odds of a quick resolution to the war appear to be dwindling by the day, and the political stakes for the president are only growing.

originalTitle: Dozens killed after Afghanistan rehab centre struck
title: Dozens killed after Afghanistan rehab centre struck
content: The BBC visited the facility and saw more than 30 bodies being carried out on stretchers.

originalTitle: Utah bereavement author found guilty of fatally poisoning her husband
title: Utah bereavement author found guilty of fatally poisoning her husband
content: A jury found that Kouri Richins killed her husband in March 2022 by poisoning him with a fentanyl-laced drink.

originalTitle: How Chelsea signed a star team with hidden payments
title: How Chelsea signed a star team with hidden payments
content: Chelsea have been hit with a Premier League record fine of £10.75m and handed a suspended transfer ban. Here's what the written reasons said.

title: Arsenal trial and self-doubt: Valverde's journey to Real legend
content: Rejected by Arsenal as a teenager, Federico Valverde has transformed himself into a Real Madrid legend - and was the main man in their Champions League win over Manchester City last week.

title: Who has made Troy's Premier League team of the week?
